prompt: Assess the likely impact of changing how Vite resolves server-related configuration defaults. Identify implementation areas and regression surfaces before editing.

expected_symbols.name: resolveConfig
expected_symbols.why: Resolves defaults and merged user config.

expected_symbols.name: createServer
expected_symbols.why: Consumes resolved server configuration while creating dev-server state.

expected_symbols.name: indexHtmlMiddleware
expected_symbols.why: Server defaults can affect HTML serving behavior.

expected_claims.text: Configuration default changes should start in resolveConfig.
Dev-server construction must be checked because it consumes resolved server configuration.
HTTP server setup and middleware behavior are likely impact surfaces for server defaults.
Regression testing should include config resolution and dev-server behavior, not only type checking.

forbidden_claims.text: Server configuration defaults are isolated from createServer.
Changing config defaults never affects middleware behavior.
